name: metricstore
description: Query and discover governed business metric definitions. Get metric formulas, SQL expressions, dimensions, and ownership info for use in AI-powered analytics.

tools.name: discover_metrics
tools.description: List available business metrics with optional filtering by type, status, owner, or tags

tools.name: get_metric_definition
tools.description: Get complete metric definition including formula, SQL expression, dimensions, and ownership

tools.name: search_metrics
tools.description: Full-text search across metric names and descriptions

tools.name: get_metric_sql
tools.description: Get the SQL expression for a metric, ready to use in queries

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List metric collections (logical groups of related metrics)

tools.name: get_collection_metrics
tools.description: Get all metrics belonging to a specific collection

env.name: API_KEYS
env.description: Comma-separated list of valid API keys
